rationale: Section 11.436 governs application procedures for low-income housing exemptions under Sections 11.181 and 11.1825, unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in Section 11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: Sec. 11.436. APPLICATION FOR EXEMPTION OF CERTAIN PROPERTY USED FOR LOW-INCOME HOUSING.
_note: Rule text concerns a distinct exemption category (low-income housing) with no reference to residence homestead exemption amounts.
